title: limonium virgatum subsp. pseudodictyocladum
intro: Limonium virgatum subsp. pseudodictyocladum is a subspecies of the Limonium virgatum plant, a type of coastal saltbush that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limonium virgatum subsp. pseudodictyocladum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into infusions or decoctions, and may be used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
